ham.subject: Your Amazon Order #1234567890 has Shipped – Track Now!
ham.body:
Hi there,

Thank you for shopping with Amazon India! Your order (Order #1234567890) has been shipped and is on its way. You can track the delivery status using the link below:

<URL>

If you have any questions, feel free to contact our support.

Thanks for choosing Amazon.

Best regards,
Amazon India Team

spam.subject: Immediate Action Required: Your Microsoft 365 Password Expiry Notice
spam.body:
Dear Microsoft 365 User,

Microsoft Security Center has detected that your account password is set to expire within 48 hours. To avoid a temporary lockout and ensure uninterrupted access to your email, OneDrive, and other services, you must update your password immediately.

Please click the link below to verify and reset your password:

<URL>

If you do not complete the verification within 48 hours, your account will be disabled. This is a mandatory security procedure.

Thank you,
Microsoft 365 Security Team
